```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Web User" as user
participant "index" as index
participant "Main.view" as mainview
participant "Image.View" as imageview
participant "ImageController" as controller
participant "DB" as db
participant "DBE" as dbe
participant "ImageModel" as model
database "images" as imagesdb
rectangle "Images" as imagesrect

user -> index : 1:Need to see some Pictures
activate index
index -->> controller : 1:1 new ImageController( new DB ( DBE ) )
activate controller
controller -> db : new DB ( BDE::MySQL)
activate db
db --> dbe : getDNS(); getUser(); getPass()
activate dbe
controller -> imagesdb : ImageController->fetchAll(): $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare(SELECT id,filename,title,description FROM images)
activate imagesdb
imagesdb ..> imagesdb
controller -> imagesdb : ImageController->fetchAll(): $stmt ->execute()
imagesdb --> controller : $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_CLASS, ImageModel::class)
deactivate imagesdb
controller --> imageview : 1:0|1]* $images array
activate imageview
imageview -> mainview : render ()
activate mainview
mainview --> imageview : + layout
deactivate mainview
deactivate imageview
deactivate controller
deactivate db
deactivate dbe
index --> user : he/she dont know how many work it was ;-)
deactivate index

@enduml
```
